issue.title: Evaluate Python Android framework candidates with explicit selection criteria

comment.body: @Ma7moud3ly thanks for the comparison. Sounds like there might be some bias to how you posed the question to the LLM 😅 but yes, from what you show here Chaquopy is the clear winner. As this task doesn't have a whole lot of hours allocated to it, lets use Chaquopy for now and just make an equivalent app for backAndForth, and basicSubscriber. basicAssembler is a fair bit more complicated, so with time limitations in mind, lets aim just for the two simplest.
